data.title: WHOOP Raises $575 Million at $10.1 Billion Valuation to Advance Global Health Platform
data.description: A company focused on human performance, WHOOP, revealed it successfully secured $575 million in Series G funding with a valuation of $10.1 billion. This funding is pivotal for their global expansion efforts and to realize their vision for personalized health solutions. The investment was spearheaded by Collaborative Fund and saw contributions from various global entities, including 2PointZero Group, Qatar Investment Authority (QIA), Mubadala Investment Company, Abbott, Mayo Clinic, and Macquarie Capital, among others like Glade Brook, and B-Flexio.

data.title: R Systems Appoints Farooq Ahmad as Chief Revenue Officer
data.description: R Systems International Limited, a prominent player in digital product engineering headquartered in Greater Noida, India, and El Dorado Hills, California, has revealed the hiring of Farooq Ahmad as the Chief Revenue Officer. This move signifies a strategic decision by the company to enhance its revenue generation efforts. Farooq Ahmad will be responsible for driving the revenue growth of the organization and leveraging his expertise in this domain to further establish R Systems International Limited as a frontrunner in the industry.

data.title: Jumio Liveness Premium Wins Gold in 2026 Cybersecurity Excellence Awards
data.description: In Sunnyvale, California, Jumio, a top provider of AI-driven identity intelligence, revealed that their Jumio Liveness Premium has clinched the Gold Award in the Biometrics sector at the 2026 Cybersecurity Excellence Awards. This prestigious award program celebrates companies showcasing excellence, innovation, and leadership in information security. Jumio's win underscores their technical innovation and practical effectiveness in aiding businesses in combating the escalating cyber threats.

data.title: Euna Solutions Announces 2025 Impact Metrics, Demonstrating Measurable ROI for State, Local and Education Customers in Managing Public Funds, Payments, and Essential Services
data.description: In a joint announcement from Toronto and Chicago, Euna Solutions, a prominent provider of specialized cloud-based solutions for the public sector, revealed its 2025 Impact Metrics. The report highlights significant progress, operational expansion, and concrete community benefits throughout North America. CEO Tom Amburgey emphasized the company's commitment to producing tangible results, noting that each dollar managed, payment processed, and purchase approved contributes to measurable outcomes. The metrics showcase a year of substantial growth, operational efficiency, and positive impacts on communities across the continent.

data.title: Sound Group Inc. Announces Special Cash Dividend
data.description: Today, Sound Group Inc., a leading global AI-powered audio company listed on NASDAQ as SOGP, declared a special cash dividend. The dividend amounts to US$0.006 per ordinary share or US$1.20 per American Depositary Share (ADS). This dividend has been approved by the company's board of directors and will be distributed to shareholders and ADS holders recorded as of April 22, 2026, at the end of business hours in U.S. Eastern Time.

data.title: aytm Names Jonathan Goodbread Head of Data Quality Strategy
data.description: In the ever-evolving landscape of survey research, the integration of AI technology is transforming methodologies and emphasizing the importance of maintaining data accuracy. Goodbread has recently teamed up with aytm (Ask Your Target Market) in San Francisco on March 31, 2026, to assist in guiding the industry through these changes. aytm, a cutting-edge market research platform, revealed this collaboration as a strategic move towards the future of data analysis and insights.

data.title: Calcatreu Project starts leaching operations, moving to operational phase. Transition well underway. #mining #operations
data.description: A new report reveals that the global economy is predicted to grow by 4.0% in 2021, an upward revision from the previous forecast of 3.6%. This increase is largely due to the accelerated vaccination rollout and substantial fiscal stimuli in major economies. The US economy is forecasted to expand by 6.4% this year, while China is expected to see a growth rate of 8.4%. The Eurozone is projected to grow by 4.3%, and Japan by 2.9%. Emerging markets and developing economies are also anticipated to rebound, with growth estimated at 6.0%. However, the recovery remains highly uncertain and uneven across countries, with risks including vaccine inequality and the potential for renewed waves of infections. Global economic growth in 2022 is forecasted to reach 3.8%, as stimulus measures are gradually unwound and the pace of recovery moderates.

data.title: Bloom Expands Partnership with Cresco Labs to Enter Pennsylvania’s Vape-Forward Medical Market
data.description: Bloom, a well-known company for its distinctive hardware platform and specialized strain formulations, is making its way into Pennsylvania's extensive medical-only cannabis market in collaboration with Cresco Labs (CSE: CL) (OTCQX: CRLBF), a major player in the U.S. cannabis industry. This expansion into one of the country's largest cannabis markets signifies Bloom's second venture with Cresco Labs, the first being a prosperous introduction at Sunnyside dispensaries throughout Florida.

data.title: Alarm.com Expands Video Security Portfolio with New AI Capabilities and Flexible Camera Solutions
data.description: In Tyson, Virginia, Alarm.com unveiled major enhancements to its video security suite, bringing in new AI-powered features and expanding the range of camera hardware options. The updates include AI Video Event Search, the introduction of the ADC-V731B Battery Spotlight Camera, and the ADC-VDB775 Video Doorbell. These innovations aim to enhance the video monitoring experience for both residential and commercial clients, enabling more efficient video searches, increased camera deployment flexibility, and improved responsiveness to activities. Alarm.com, listed on Nasdaq as ALRM, continues to lead in providing intelligent solutions for connected properties.

data.title: Greenlane Sets New Security Benchmark for Commercial EV Charging with Industry-Leading SOC 2 Type 2 Compliance
data.description: In Santa Monica, California, Greenlane, a developer and operator of public charging infrastructure, has addressed the growing demand for security and compliance standards in the expanding fleet electrification sector. The company has recently achieved its System and Organization Controls (SOC) 2 Type 2 examination and report for the period between December 1, 2024, and November 30, 2025. This independent evaluation highlights Greenlane's dedication to data security and operational integrity in response to enterprise operators' needs in the sector.

data.title: T1 Energy Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Results
data.description: T1 Energy Inc. (NYSE: TE) announced its financial and operational performance for the full-year 2025 today. The company, based in Austin, Texas and New York, disclosed the results for the fourth quarter as well. T1 Energy is hosting a conference call at 8:00 am EDT on the same day to discuss these outcomes.

data.title: Sound Group Inc. Reports Unaudited Financial Results for the Second Half and Fiscal Year 2025
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Sound Group Inc. (NASDAQ: SOGP), a worldwide AI-driven audio firm, revealed its unaudited financial results for the six months and fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025.
